narrative.headline: 2020 GMC Terrain: brakes and engine lead owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 177 complaints with NHTSA. Service brakes are the single biggest concern at 36% of reports, tied to 5 crashes and 2 injuries. Engine trouble comes next at 31%, also with 2 injuries, then electrical at 15%, power train at 14%, and the fuel system at 11%. No fires and no deaths were reported.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: The top complaint area: 64 reports (36%). Linked to 5 crashes and 2 injuries, so it is the one to inspect most carefully before buying.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 54 reports (31%), tied to 2 injuries. Watch for any engine warning and check it runs smoothly on a test drive.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 26 reports (15%), with no crashes or injuries noted. Check that the electronics all work during a test drive.

issues.blurb: 25 reports (14%), with no crashes or injuries noted. Test how the car drives and shifts under load.

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: The smallest of the top five: 20 reports (11%), with no crashes or injuries noted. Confirm the tank fills and the gauge reads correctly.
